about.heading: About Us

about.story_paragraph: We started as a small trading circle frustrated by marketing hype and hidden costs. Today, ForexBrokerRatings exists to give every trader new or seasoned clear, verifiable information on regulation, pricing, and execution so they can trade with peace of mind.
about.vision_paragraph: A forex landscape where decisions are driven by facts, not slogans.

ai.msa.title: Market Sentiment Analyzer
ai.msa.subtitle: Aggregated from stocks, commodities, FX and yields
ai.msa.how_to_use_title: How to use the Market Sentiment Analyzer
ai.msa.how_p1_part1: The meter gives a quick read on the market risk appetite right now. When the gauge leans to
ai.msa.how_p1_part2: , traders tend to favor growth and higher & yield assets. When it leans to
ai.msa.how_p1_part3: , capital often rotates into defensive assets and safe havens.
ai.msa.risk_on_li1: Optimistic mood; higher willingness to take risk.
ai.msa.risk_on_li2: Tailwinds often include upbeat data, strong earnings, or supportive policy.
ai.msa.risk_on_li3: Flows tilt toward equities, oil/commodities, and higher & beta FX like AUD.
ai.msa.risk_off_li1: More cautious mood; preference for safety and capital preservation.
ai.msa.risk_off_li2: Often driven by weak data, earnings misses, geopolitics, or uncertainty.
ai.msa.risk_off_li3: Flows tilt toward gold, USD/JPY strength, and higher Treasury yields.
ai.msa.apply_li1: Use the reading as a short & term context tool, not a stand & alone signal.
ai.msa.apply_li2: Align ideas with the prevailing mood (trade with, not against, sentiment).
ai.msa.apply_li3: Risk sentiment can flip day & to & day reassess frequently.
ai.msa.score_p1_part1: The score blends daily changes across a small basket of widely & watched assets. Risk & on assets (e.g., S&P 500, Oil, AUD/USD) push the score higher when they rise; risk & off assets (e.g., Gold, USD/JPY, US 10Y yield) pull it lower when they rise. The final reading ranges from

regulations.faq.tier1.a: A Tier-1 regulator is a top-level financial watchdog, such as the FCA (UK), ASIC (Australia), or CBI (Ireland), known for strict oversight and client protection.
regulations.faq.spreads.a: Spreads reflect market liquidity, broker model (ECN/STP/MM), and trading hours. Raw accounts offer tight spreads plus commission; standard accounts bundle costs into the spread.
regulations.faq.platforms.a: Most offer MT4/MT5, cTrader, or proprietary apps. Platform choice affects execution speed, order types, and available tools.
regulations.faq.licence.q: How do I check a broker's licence?
regulations.faq.licence.a: Visit the regulator's official register (e.g., FCA, ASIC) and search for the broker's name or licence number.
regulations.faq.min_deposit.a: Minimums range from $0 to $200+ depending on broker/account type. Always check the broker's funding page for up-to-date info.
regulations.faq.promotions.a: Promotions can offer value but check the terms and ensure the broker is well regulated before participating.

guides.choose_broker: How to Choose a Forex Broker
guides.choose_broker_desc: Learn how to evaluate and compare brokers using key criteria like regulation, spreads, and platforms. Includes interactive comparison tools and real-world examples.
guides.more_coming_desc: Stay tuned for advanced trading strategies, platform walkthroughs, and more.
guide.select.header_title: How to Use the Compare Brokers Feature
guide.select.header_subtitle: Quickly find the right broker for you by comparing key features side by side.
guide.select.access_compare_hint: Go to the Compare Brokers page from the main navigation.
guide.select.select_brokers_hint: Use the search bar to find brokers by name, or browse the list. Click Add to Compare on up to 3 brokers to add them to your comparison list.
guide.select.view_table_hint: Scroll down to see a side-by-side table of your selected brokers. You can compare important details like regulation, spreads, leverage, platforms, and more.
guide.select.interpret_results_hint: Review the table to see how each broker stacks up. Use the information to choose the broker that best fits your trading needs.
guide.select.field.regulation_desc: Whether the broker is licensed and overseen by a financial authority.
guide.select.field.spreads_desc: The difference between buy and sell prices. Lower spreads mean lower trading costs.
guide.select.field.leverage_desc: The ratio of borrowed funds to your own. Higher leverage increases both potential gains and risks.
guide.select.field.platforms_desc: The trading software offered (e.g., MetaTrader, cTrader, WebTrader).
guide.select.field.min_deposit_desc: The smallest amount required to open an account.
guide.select.tip1: You can compare up to 3 brokers at a time.
guide.select.tip2: Some fields (like spreads or leverage) may vary based on account type or region. Always check the broker's official site for the latest info.
guide.select.tip3: Use the "Visit Broker" button to learn more or open an account directly with the broker.
guide.select.tip4: Regulation status is an important safety factor prioritize regulated brokers when possible.

privacy.sections.who-we-are.title: 1. Who We Are & Scope
privacy.sections.frameworks.title: 2. Legal Frameworks
privacy.sections.data-we-collect.title: 3. Information We Collect
privacy.sections.bases.title: 4. Purposes & Legal Bases
privacy.sections.cookies.title: 5. Cookies & Tracking
privacy.sections.transfers.title: 6. Global Data Transfers
privacy.sections.sharing.title: 7. How We Share Information
privacy.sections.retention.title: 8. Data Retention
privacy.sections.security.title: 9. Security Measures
privacy.sections.rights.title: 10. Your Rights
privacy.sections.automated.title: 11. Automated Decision-Making
privacy.sections.thirdparties.title: 12. Third-Party Links
privacy.sections.children.title: 13. Children's Privacy
privacy.sections.changes.title: 14. Changes to This Policy
privacy.sections.who-we-are.p1: ForexBrokerRatings ('we', 'us') operates an informational website that provides broker reviews and comparison tools. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your choices.
privacy.sections.frameworks.p1: We align our practices with major privacy frameworks worldwide. The specific rights you have may depend on where you live.
privacy.sections.frameworks.p2: Where required, we use appropriate transfer safeguards (e.g., SCCs) and enter DPAs with vendors that process data on our behalf.
privacy.sections.data-we-collect.p1: We collect only what is necessary to operate our site, provide services, measure performance, prevent abuse, and comply with law.
privacy.sections.cookies.p1: We use essential cookies for core functionality and analytics cookies to understand usage. You can control cookies via your browser settings.
privacy.sections.transfers.p1: Personal data may be processed outside your country. When we do, we apply safeguards to protect it.
privacy.sections.transfers.li1: Use of standard contractual clauses where applicable
privacy.sections.transfers.li2: Vendor due diligence and access controls
privacy.sections.sharing.p1: We do not sell personal data. We may share information with parties below for limited purposes:
privacy.sections.sharing.li2: Regulatory or legal authorities when required by law
privacy.sections.sharing.li3: Prospective buyers in a merger, acquisition, or asset sale
privacy.sections.sharing.li4: With your consent or at your direction
privacy.sections.sharing.p2: All recipients are required to use the data only for the specified purpose and to protect it appropriately.
privacy.sections.retention.p1: We retain personal data only for as long as needed to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
privacy.sections.security.p1: No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure; however, we implement industry-standard safeguards to reduce risk.
privacy.sections.rights.p1: You can exercise your privacy rights by contacting us at support@forexbrokeratings.com. We will verify your request and respond within the applicable timeframes.
privacy.sections.automated.p1: We do not use automated decision-making that produces legal or similarly significant effects about you.
privacy.sections.thirdparties.p1: Our site may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their content or privacy practices; review their policies before providing any data.
privacy.sections.children.p1: Our services are not directed to children under 13 (or the age required in your region). We do not knowingly collect data from children.
privacy.sections.changes.p1: We may update this policy periodically. The 'Last updated' date shows the latest revision. Material changes will be highlighted on this page.
privacy.sections.frameworks.rows.gdpr.ri: Art. 6 lawful bases, Art. 15–22 data-subject rights, SCCs for transfers
privacy.sections.frameworks.rows.ccpa.ri: Notice at collection, 'sale/share' opt-out, enhanced consumer rights
privacy.sections.frameworks.rows.lgpd.ri: Legitimate interest basis, data portability, DPO contact
privacy.sections.data-we-collect.rows.id: email, IP, cookie ID, device fingerprint
privacy.sections.data-we-collect.rows.us: pages viewed, clicks on broker links, session duration
privacy.sections.rights.rows.gdpr.how: Access, rectify, erase, restrict, object, data portability, lodge complaint with supervisory authority.
privacy.sections.rights.rows.ccpa.how: Know, delete, correct, opt-out of sale/share, limit use of sensitive data.
privacy.sections.rights.rows.lgpd.how: Confirm processing, anonymise, data portability, revoke consent.
privacy.sections.rights.rows.others.how: Equivalent rights under PIPEDA, POPIA, etc.
